scripts.check: bun run --filter @engram/sdk typecheck && bun run --filter @engram/cli typecheck && bun run --filter @engram/ui-app typecheck && bun run --filter @engram/cloud-app typecheck && cd apps/kernel && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.deploy:ui: bun run --filter @engram/ui-app build && wrangler deploy -c apps/ui/wrangler.jsonc
